items.summary: In WebsiteLayoutPanel, modify the local time display format to show the UTC offset within the date string (e.g., 'February 24, 2026 (UTC +8)' instead of separate UTC+8 label). The XPath for the element to modify is /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/strong[3].

In LocationMapExplorer, add a display above the 'Select UTC Offset' button that shows the current local time and its UTC offset in the same format as REQ-1 (e.g., 'Local Time: February 24, 2026 (UTC +8)'). The XPath for reference is /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/strong[2].
